name: io.github.osama-ata/p6xer-mcp-server
title: p6xer MCP Server
description: An MCP server for Primavera P6 XER files.

environmentVariables.name: P6XER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key used to authenticate with p6xer service.

environmentVariables.name: P6XER_ENDPOINT
environmentVariables.description: Optional p6xer endpoint URL (default uses local p6xer daemon).

environmentVariables.name: P6XER_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Optional log verbosity level (e.g., DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR).
